meta.title: SoloBond — A quiet connection for solo living
meta.description: Live alone or travel solo? One tap each morning — your trusted contact knows you're okay. No calls, no chats. Just a quiet signal between you.

hero.headline: A quiet connection for solo living.
hero.subline: Live alone or travel solo? One tap each morning — your trusted contact knows you're okay. No calls, no chats. Just a quiet signal between you.

problem.headline: You love your independence.
problem.body: You chose this life — the solo apartment, the spontaneous trips, the freedom. But sometimes, late at night or on a quiet morning, a thought crosses your mind: Would anyone notice if something happened? SoloBond replaces the daily 'Are you okay?' texts with something simpler. One tap. Three seconds. Done.

step1.title: Check in
step1.description: One tap. Three seconds. That's it.

step2.title: Choose a color
step2.description: How's your day? Pick a color. No words needed.

step3.title: They know you're okay
step3.description: Your trusted contact sees your signal. A quiet 'I'm here.'

trustedContact.headline: For your trusted contact
trustedContact.body: Your mom, your sibling, your best friend — they don't even need the app. If you miss a check-in, they get a gentle email. If they install SoloBond, they see your daily status and can send a heart back. A quiet 'I see you.'
trustedContact.noAppRequired: No app required for your contact.

pricing.headline: Free to use. Built to last.
pricing.body: SoloBond is free — and always will be for the core experience. Daily check-ins, one trusted contact, Day Colors, and streaks are yours at no cost.
pricing.premiumHint: Premium features like SMS alerts, custom check-in times, and multiple trusted contacts are coming soon.

privacy.headline: Privacy-first. Always.
privacy.body: No GPS. No location tracking. No ads. No data selling. Your daily ritual stays between you and your trusted contact.

items.question: What is SoloBond?
items.answer: SoloBond is a daily check-in app for people who live alone or travel solo. One tap each morning lets your trusted contact know you're okay — no calls, no chats, no explaining.

items.question: How does it work?
items.answer: Check in once a day (it takes 3 seconds). Your trusted contact sees your status in the app or gets an email if you miss a check-in. That's it — simple by design.

items.question: Does my trusted contact need to install the app?
items.answer: No. They can simply receive email alerts if you ever miss a check-in. But if they install the app, they get a dashboard with your daily status and can send a heart back as a quiet 'I see you.'

items.question: What happens if I miss a check-in?
items.answer: First, you'll get a gentle reminder. If you still don't check in, your trusted contact receives a heads-up after 24 hours — giving you plenty of time without false alarms.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Yes. No GPS, no location tracking, no ads, no data selling. Your check-in stays between you and your trusted contact. You can delete your data anytime in Settings.

items.question: Does my trusted contact have to agree?
items.answer: Yes. Your trusted contact must accept your invitation before the connection is active. They can unsubscribe anytime — when they do, all their data is deleted immediately.

items.question: Is SoloBond an emergency service?
items.answer: No. SoloBond is a daily routine with a safety net — not a replacement for emergency services. If you're in immediate danger, call your local emergency number.

footer.tagline: A quiet connection for solo living.
